nodes.title: 10 可选实验：Perfect Pixel（默认旁路）
12 主体15色 + 黑边 = 最多16种可见RGB
16 扩张 1px 生成黑边范围
20 最终 RGBA：透明 + 1px 黑边
21 保存所选尺寸透明PNG成品
22 所选成品最近邻放大到512×512（只预览）
23 所选64/128/256人物头像像素级检查预览
P1 GPT Image 2 原始输出（1024×1024）
P3 最近邻放大缩小后的64×64（仅预览）
P3 缩小到64×64后的像素结构
P4 最近邻放大64×64/15色结果（仅预览）
P4 64×64主体15色量化结果（黑边前）
P2B RMBG前景Mask预览（白色必须完整）
128B 可选 Perfect Pixel（默认旁路）
128D 主体31色 + 黑边 = 最多32种可见RGB
256B 可选 Perfect Pixel（默认旁路）
256D 主体47色 + 黑边 = 最多48种可见RGB
00A 可选参考图：仅图生图模式使用
00B 生图模式：1=文生图 / 2=图生图
01B GPT Image 2 图生图（00B选择2，使用00A参考图）
widgets_values:
Transform the provided reference into one production-ready square pixel-art dialogue portrait of the same character.
Preserve the character's identity, face, hairstyle, clothing, accessories, colors, age and expression.
Show one character only, framed from the mid-torso or chest upward: head, neck, shoulders, arms and clearly readable upper-body clothing. This is a bust portrait, not a head-only icon and not a full-body character.
Center the character in a straight-on or gentle three-quarter view. Keep the entire hair silhouette, both shoulders and the upper torso inside the square canvas with a narrow even margin; do not crop the top of the hair or sides of the shoulders.
Retro 2D game pixel art for a dialogue-box portrait, with deliberate pixel clusters, crisp hard edges, a clean dark 1-pixel-style outer silhouette, flat color regions, controlled cel shading and top-left lighting. Preserve facial readability at small size.
Use a completely solid flat magenta background (#FF00FF), with no texture and no gradient, for clean background removal.
No scenery, decorative frame, speech bubble, text, logo, extra character, duplicate face, floating head, severed torso, full body, extreme pose, large hand covering the face, cast shadow, glow, photorealism, 3D rendering, antialiasing, blur, painterly brushwork or smooth gradients.

nodes.title: 01A GPT Image 2 文生图（首行改角色，00B选择1）
widgets_values:
Create one Miku as a production-ready square pixel-art dialogue portrait.
Show one character only, framed from the mid-torso or chest upward: head, neck, shoulders, arms and clearly readable upper-body clothing. This is a bust portrait, not a head-only icon and not a full-body character.
Center the character in a straight-on or gentle three-quarter view. Keep the entire hair silhouette, both shoulders and the upper torso inside the square canvas with a narrow even margin; do not crop the top of the hair or sides of the shoulders.
Make the face and expression readable, with recognizable eyes, hairstyle, costume collar and upper-body accessories. Use a natural dialogue portrait pose; hands may appear only when small and below the face.
Retro 2D game pixel art with deliberate pixel clusters, crisp hard edges, a clean dark 1-pixel-style outer silhouette, flat color regions, controlled cel shading and top-left lighting. Preserve clear shapes that remain readable after reduction to 64x64.
Use a completely solid flat magenta background (#FF00FF), with no texture and no gradient, for clean background removal.
No scenery, decorative frame, speech bubble, text, logo, extra character, duplicate face, floating head, severed torso, full body, extreme pose, large hand covering the face, cast shadow, glow, photorealism, 3D rendering, antialiasing, blur, painterly brushwork or smooth gradients.

groups.title: A GPT Image 2 付费像素人物半身头像生成区
B 人物透明化与64×64/16色输出（Perfect Pixel默认旁路）
D 硬Alpha + 1px黑边（最多16种可见RGB）
E 保存成品与最近邻预览
F 重要步骤诊断预览（从左到右）
G 可选图生图：只改00B，1关闭/2开启

qgn_navigation_groups.groupName: 【📦文生图可选】多人提示词编辑

【🔍预览】提示词与文本缓存预览
